selections.name: Manferno
selections.reason: Draws the coveted rail at Yonkers. With Gingras in the bike and coming off a strong win, he controls the pace from the inside.

selections.name: Hammering Hank
selections.reason: Excellent inside draw. Holland should be able to secure the pocket trip right behind the favorite.

selections.name: Peace Out Posse
selections.reason: Bako/Kelly combo is dangerous. Won his last start and draws well enough to be a major factor early.

selections.name: Ourmatemenko N
selections.reason: Stratton gets the sweet spot post 4. Consistent performer who can land a piece of the exotics with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Lyrical Genius A
danger_horse.reason: Brennan is aggressive, but post 5 is tricky on this half-mile oval. Capable if he can cross over early.

selections.name: Telitonthemountain
selections.reason: Gingras driving for Engblom from post 4 is a massive angle. Should be sent off the gate to establish early position.

selections.name: Topville Somebeach
selections.reason: Brennan gets a great inside draw. Consistent form makes him a logical contender for the top two spots.

selections.name: Lyons Benjamin
selections.reason: Stratton will use the inside post to his advantage. Should get an economical trip saving ground.

selections.name: Avenger Force
selections.reason: Rail draw gives him a huge tactical edge on this bullring. Holland just needs to protect his position.

danger_horse.name: All Alone
danger_horse.reason: Kakaley is a top driver, but the post position bias works against him here. Needs a perfect setup.

selections.name: Zebs Krafty
selections.reason: Won his last start and now gets the rail. Stratton will likely wire the field from this advantageous spot.

selections.name: Ever Hoping A
selections.reason: Brennan from post 2 is a lethal combination. Will be right there tracking the favorite every step.

selections.name: Mind Hunter
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures, but Marohn will have to make a decision early from post 5 to avoid being parked.

selections.name: Samhara N
selections.reason: Holland gets a good inside draw. Should be able to secure a trip and hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Pyro
danger_horse.reason: Gingras can never be ignored, especially from post 4. Could blast off the gate and disrupt the pace.

selections.name: I'm Some Graduate
selections.reason: Gingras from post 4 is the prime angle. Class edge and tactical speed make him the one to beat.

selections.name: Major Pocket A
selections.reason: Kelly gets a great inside draw. Consistent performer who should get a cozy trip behind the speed.

selections.name: Dancininthefire
selections.reason: Kakaley from post 2 is dangerous. Solid recent form suggests he will be a factor late.

selections.name: Captain Dee Tee
selections.reason: Bongiorno gets the rail. Gate speed is paramount here, and the inside post provides a massive advantage.

danger_horse.name: Over The Horizon
danger_horse.reason: Won his last start but draws terribly outside. Holland will need a miracle trip to factor here.

selections.name: American Dealer N
selections.reason: Burke trainee with Brennan driving. Classy horse who can overcome the slightly outside draw with his raw speed.

selections.name: The Ideal Dancer A
selections.reason: Lachance gets the sweet spot post 4. Very consistent and should be placed perfectly early on.

selections.name: Rocknroll Gold
selections.reason: Bongiorno from post 2 is a strong angle. Inside draw gives him a huge tactical advantage over the favorites.

selections.name: Collective Works A
selections.reason: Siegelman gets the rail. Must protect position early to utilize the track bias effectively.

danger_horse.name: None Bettor A
danger_horse.reason: Kakaley driving from post 3 makes him a legitimate threat if the pace sets up for a closer.

selections.name: Bet On Big Joe
selections.reason: Bako trainee with Kelly driving from post 4. Strong recent form and gets the perfect launch pad.

selections.name: Keayang Kamikaze A
selections.reason: Marohn gets the rail for Tritton. The inside advantage at Yonkers makes him a massive threat to wire.

selections.name: Soho Santorini A
selections.reason: Gingras driving from an inside post is always dangerous. Will be aggressively handled early.

selections.name: Keayang Taco A
selections.reason: Stratton from post 2. Should get an economical trip saving ground on the tight turns.

danger_horse.name: My Ultimate Byron A
danger_horse.reason: Siegelman driving, but post 5 is a tough spot. Needs the inside horses to battle early.

selections.name: Soho Firestone A
selections.reason: Gingras from post 4 is the premier angle at Yonkers. Strong form and tactical speed make him the clear choice.

selections.name: Joemikiyoursofine
selections.reason: Holland gets the rail. Classy veteran who will use the inside draw to secure a top-two trip.

selections.name: Little Willy
selections.reason: Kelly driving for Bako. Good inside post allows him to stalk the pace and pounce late.

selections.name: Vicious
selections.reason: Bongiorno driving, but post 5 requires a perfect drive. Has the speed if he can cross over.

danger_horse.name: Rocket City A
danger_horse.reason: Lachance from post 2. Inside draw gives him a chance to hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Captinhammerhead A
selections.reason: Zeron driving from post 4 in an Invitational. Elite class and gets the best post on the track to launch.

selections.name: Verdun
selections.reason: Lachance gets the rail in a high-class field. The inside advantage is massive here; will protect the pocket.

selections.name: Young Bluey A
selections.reason: Gingras driving for Bako from post 2. Extremely dangerous combo that will be aggressive early.

selections.name: Endofstory
selections.reason: Stratton from post 3. Consistent performer who should get a great trip behind the speed duel.

danger_horse.name: Howlenthehills
danger_horse.reason: Kakaley driving, but post 5 in an Invitational is tough. Needs a complete pace meltdown to win.

selections.name: Stonebridge Wizard
selections.reason: Gingras driving for Bako. Post 5 is tricky, but his raw speed and driver intent should overcome it.

selections.name: Escape To America
selections.reason: Kelly gets a great inside draw. Should be able to secure a pocket trip and strike in the short stretch.

selections.name: Speculating A
selections.reason: Siegelman from post 2. Inside advantage makes him a major player for the exotics.

selections.name: Pop It
selections.reason: Kakaley gets the rail. Must use the inside draw to protect position and save ground.

danger_horse.name: Carabao A
danger_horse.reason: Stratton from post 4 is always a threat. Can leave the gate and disrupt the early pace scenario.
